sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions after the last click
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] > 1:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Purple ring: center=({sum(rows)//len(rows)},{sum(cols)//len(cols)}), px={n['pixels']}")
    if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] > 1:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Dark gray target: center=({sum(rows)//len(rows)},{sum(cols)//len(cols)})")
    if n['color'] == 'M':
        print(f"  Magenta: at {n['boundary']}")

# Check what changed
if previous_frame:
    prev_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in previous_frame.segmentation['nodes']}
    curr_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in nodes}
    print("\n  Comparing to previous frame...")
    
# Let's also look at the ascii around the target area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n  Target area (rows 54-62, cols 24-31):")
for i in range(54, min(63, len(ascii_lines))):
    print(f"    Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][24:32]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
